name: @lastmile-gig/ecosystem
description: Lastmile Gig - AI Singularity Operating System for South Africa's Last-Mile Delivery Industry
author: Affiliated Architecture Group (AAG)

scripts.loc:count: find apps/ libs/ contracts/ infrastructure/ -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.py' -o -name '*.go' -o -name '*.rs' -o -name '*.java' -o -name '*.ex' -o -name '*.exs' -o -name '*.sol' -o -name '*.tf' -o -name '*.hcl' -o -name '*.yaml' -o -name '*.yml' -o -name '*.sql' \) -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/dist/*' -not -path '*/.next/*' -not -path '*/target/*' -not -path '*/_build/*' | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | tail -1
scripts.loc:detail: find apps/ libs/ -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' \) -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/dist/*' | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | sort -n
